seoTitle: Windabout vs Windy Harbour — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Windabout and Windy Harbour. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Windabout vs Windy Harbour: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Windabout and Windy Harbour.
heading: Windabout vs Windy Harbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Windabout, Western Australia and Windy Harbour, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Windy Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Windabout (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Windabout or Windy Harbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Windabout has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Windy Harbour scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Windabout scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Windy Harbour scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Windabout or Windy Harbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Windy Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
